raw_consumer_statement: I disputed a {$4700.00} charge ( XXXX, XX/XX/year> ; Amex XXXX XXXX ). The merchant later confirmed in writing it issued a {$4700.00} credit to my Amex ending XXXX on XX/XX/year> ( attached ). Amex closed my dispute stating no refund promised and told me to work it out with the merchant. Under RegZ 1026.13 ( a ) ( 4 ), failure to reflect a credit is a billing error ; under 1026.13 ( a ) ( 3 ) the nondelivery claim is also a billing error ; and the CFPBs own commentary says notice to the merchant is not required. Please require Amex to post the credit, reverse related finance charges/fees, and cease collection on the disputed amount per 1026.13 ( d ).
